This works for TypeScript compilation because it's a declaration. At runtime, the esbuild IIFE bundle will include the sidebar.tsx `const vscodeApi = acquireVsCodeApi()` which will be available before the App is rendered ‚Äî but how do the component modules access it?
> 
> Actually in the IIFE bundle, all code is concatenated into one file. The `vscodeApi` declared with `const` at the top level of the bundle WILL be in the same scope as the component code. But TypeScript's module system wraps each file ‚Äî `const vscodeApi` in sidebar.tsx would be module-scoped.
> 
> The simplest approach: make the Workbench/Tasks/Settings components receive a `onPostMessage` callback as a prop instead of using a global `vscodeApi`. This way there's no scope issue.

> Or better: create a tiny shared module in media/ that wraps acquireVsCodeApi and export it, so all components can import it.

```typescript
import React from 'react';
import { vscodeApi } from '../vscode';
import type { AppConfig } from '../../src/shared';

interface Props {
  config: AppConfig;
  onConfigChange: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
  mdFileName: string;
  statusMsg: string;
}

export const Workbench: React.FC<Props> = ({ config, onConfigChange, mdFileName, statusMsg }) => {
  return (
    <div className="workbench">
      <div className="controls-row">
        <select value={config.model} onChange={e => onConfigChange('model', e.target.value)}>
          <option value="nano-banana-2">nano-banana-2</option>
          <option value="nano-banana-pro">nano-banana-pro</option>
          <option value="gpt-image-2">gpt-image-2</option>
          <option value="gpt-image-2-vip">gpt-image-2-vip</option>
        </select>
        <select value={config.imageSize} onChange={e => onConfigChange('imageSize', e.target.value)}>
          <option value="1K">1K</option>
          <option value="2K">2K</option>
          <option value="4K">4K</option>
        </select>
        <select value={config.aspectRatio} onChange={e => onConfigChange('aspectRatio', e.target.value)}>
          <option value="1:1">1:1</option>
          <option value="3:4">3:4</option>
          <option value="4:3">4:3</option>
          <option value="16:9">16:9</option>
          <option value="9:16">9:16</option>
        </select>
        <div className="stepper">
          <label>Âπ∂Âèë: {config.concurrency}</label>
          <input type="range" min={1} max={10} value={config.concurrency}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('concurrency', parseInt(e.target.value, 10))} />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="generate-row">
        <div className="current-md">{mdFileName}</div>
        <button onClick={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'previewRequest', mdPath: '' })}>È¢ÑËßàËØ∑Ê±Ç</button>
        <button className="primary" onClick={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'generate', mdPath: '' })}>ÁîüÊàê</button>
      </div>

      {statusMsg && <div className="status-line">{statusMsg}</div>}
    </div>
  );
};

```

```typescript
      <div className="setting-item">
        <label>API Key</label>
        <input type="password" value={config.apiKey}
          onChange={e => {
            const key = e.target.value;
            vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'setApiKey', key });
            onConfigChange('apiKey', key);
          }}
          placeholder="ËæìÂÖ• API Key" />
        <a href="#" onClick={(e) => {
          e.preventDefault();
          vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'openInBrowser', url: 'https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys' });

          <option value="https://grsai.dakka.com.cn">ÂõΩÂÜÖËäÇÁÇπ</option>
          <option value="https://grsaiapi.com">ÂÖ®ÁêÉËäÇÁÇπ</option>
        </select>

      <div className="setting-item">
        <label>Â∑•‰ΩúÂè∞ÊØèË°åÂºÝÊï∞</label>
        <input type="range" min={1} max={8} value={config.workbenchCols}
          onChange={e => onConfigChange('workbenchCols', parseInt(e.target.value, 10))} />
        <span>{config.workbenchCols}</span>
      </div>
      <div className="setting-item">
        <label>‰ªªÂä°ÊÝèÊØèË°åÂºÝÊï∞</label>
        <input type="range" min={1} max={8} value={config.tasksCols}
          onChange={e => onConfigChange('tasksCols', parseInt(e.target.value, 10))} />
        <span>{config.tasksCols}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
```

```css
* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

.app { font-family: var(--vscode-font-family); font-size: 13px; color: var(--vscode-foreground); padding: 8px; }

.tab-bar { display: flex; gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--vscode-panel-border); }
.tab { background: none; border: none; color: var(--vscode-disabledForeground); cursor: pointer; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 13px; }
.tab.active { color: var(--vscode-foreground); border-bottom: 2px solid var(--vscode-focusBorder); }

.controls-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.controls-row select, .controls-row input { width: 100%; background: var(--vscode-input-background); color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); padding: 2px 4px; font-size: 12px; }

.generate-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.generate-row .current-md { flex: 1; font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
.generate-row button { padding: 3px 10px; font-size: 12px; background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryBackground); color: var(--vscode-button-secondaryForeground); border: none; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 2px; }
.generate-row button.primary { background: var(--vscode-button-background); color: var(--vscode-button-foreground); }
.generate-row button.primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

.status-line { font-size: 11px; min-height: 16px; margin-top: 4px; }
.status-line:empty { display: none; }

.tasks-page h3, .settings-page h3 { font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 8px; }

.empty-hint { color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); font-size: 12px; font-style: italic; }

.setting-item { margin-bottom: 8px; }
.setting-item label { display: block; font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); margin-bottom: 2px; }
.setting-item input[type="password"],
.setting-item select { width: 100%; background: var(--vscode-input-background); color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); padding: 3px 6px; font-size: 13px; }
.setting-item a { font-size: 11px; color: var(--vscode-textLink-foreground); text-decoration: none; }
.setting-item a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

.task-card { background: var(--vscode-input-background); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-panel-border); border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; font-size: 12px; }

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdown } from './markdown-parser';
import { submitGenerate, queryResult } from './api';
import { extFromUrl } from './image-utils';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebar-provider';

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context);

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider)
  );

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', (uri?: vscode.Uri) =>
      handleGenerate(context, uri)
    )
  );

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', (_uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage('previewRequest - ÂæÖÂÆûÁé∞');
    })
  );
}

export function deactivate() {}

// --- ËæÖÂä©ÂáΩÊï∞ ---

function pad(n: number): string { return String(n).padStart(2, '0'); }

function sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> { return new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); }

function createTaskFolder(mdDir: string): string {
  const now = new Date();
  const ts = `${String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2)}${pad(now.getMonth() + 1)}${pad(now.getDate())}${pad(now.getHours())}${pad(now.getMinutes())}${pad(now.getSeconds())}`;
  let seq = 0;
  let name: string;
  do {
    seq++;
    name = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
  } while (fs.existsSync(path.join(mdDir, name)));
  fs.mkdirSync(path.join(mdDir, name));
  return name;
}

async function getApiKey(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<string> {
  const secrets = context.secrets;
  let key = await secrets.get('imageFlow.apiKey');
  if (!key) {
    key = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('imageFlow').get<string>('apiKey') ?? '';
  }
  return key;
}

async function downloadFile(url: string, dest: string): Promise<void> {
  const res = await fetch(url);
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`‰∏ãËΩΩÂ§±Ë¥•: ${res.status}`);
  const buf = Buffer.from(await res.arrayBuffer());
  fs.writeFileSync(dest, buf);
}

async function handleGenerate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, uri?: vscode.Uri) {
  const mdUri = uri ?? vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
  if (!mdUri || !mdUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('ËØ∑Âè≥ÈîÆÁÇπÂáª Markdown Êñá‰ª∂ÊàñÊâìÂºÄ .md Êñá‰ª∂ÂêéÊâßË°å');
    return;
  }

  const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('imageFlow');
  const apiKey = await getApiKey(context);
  if (!apiKey) {
    const action = await vscode.window.showErrorMessage('ËØ∑ÂÖàËÆæÁΩÆ API Key', 'ÂéªËÆæÁΩÆ');
    if (action === 'ÂéªËÆæÁΩÆ') {
      vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.openSettings', 'imageFlow.apiKey');
    }
    return;
  }

  const raw = fs.readFileSync(mdUri.fsPath, 'utf-8');
  if (raw.trim() === '') {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('ÂÜÖÂÆπ‰∏∫Á©∫');
    return;
  }

  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const { body, images, errors: parseErrors } = parseMarkdown(raw, mdDir);
  if (parseErrors.length > 0) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`ÂèÇËÄÉÂõæËØªÂèñÂ§±Ë¥•:\n${parseErrors.join('\n')}`);
    return;
  }

  const baseUrl = config.get<string>('baseUrl') ?? 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn';
  const model = config.get<string>('model') ?? 'nano-banana-2';
  const aspectRatio = config.get<string>('aspectRatio') ?? '3:4';
  const imageSize = config.get<string>('imageSize') ?? '1K';

  try {
    const folderName = createTaskFolder(mdDir);

    // M1 Èò∂ÊÆµ: ÂêåÊ≠•ÂçïÂºÝÁîüÊàê
    const jobId = await submitGenerate({
      baseUrl, apiKey, model, prompt: body,
      images: images.map(i => i.dataUri),
      aspectRatio, imageSize,
    });

    // ÂêåÊ≠•ËΩÆËØ¢Áõ¥Âà∞ÂÆåÊàê
    let result = await queryResult(baseUrl, apiKey, jobId);
    while (result.status === 'running') {
      await sleep(2000);
      result = await queryResult(baseUrl, apiKey, jobId);
    }

    if (result.status === 'succeeded' && result.results) {
      const mdName = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');
      for (let i = 0; i < result.results.length; i++) {
        const ext = extFromUrl(result.results[i].url);
        const filename = `${mdName}-${i + 1}.${ext}`;
        await downloadFile(result.results[i].url, path.join(mdDir, folderName, filename));
      }
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`ÁîüÊàêÂÆåÊàêÔºåÂÖ± ${result.results.length} ÂºÝÂõæ`);
    } else {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`ÁîüÊàêÂ§±Ë¥•: ${result.error ?? 'Êú™Áü•ÈîôËØØ'}`);
    }
  } catch (err) {
    const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`ÁîüÊàêÂ§±Ë¥•: ${msg}`);
  }
}

```
</details>

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';

// ÁßçÂ≠êÊ≥®ÂÖ•Âè•ÔºàÁî®‰∫éÈ¶ñÊ¨°ÊøÄÊ¥ªÁßçÂÖ•Ôºâ
const SEED_INJECTIONS: Record<string, string> = {
  'gpt-image-2': 'Êï¥‰ΩìÁîªÈù¢Âº±ÂåñÂæÆÂ∞èÁªÜËäÇÔºåÈÅøÂÖçËøáÂ∫¶ÂàªÁîª„ÄÇ',
  'gpt-image-2-vip': 'Êï¥‰ΩìÁîªÈù¢Âº±ÂåñÂæÆÂ∞èÁªÜËäÇÔºåÈÅøÂÖçËøáÂ∫¶ÂàªÁîª„ÄÇ',
};

/**
 * È¶ñÊ¨°ÊøÄÊ¥ªÊó∂ÁßçÂÖ• modelInjections ÁßçÂ≠êÔºö
 * Âè™Ë°•ÈÖçÁΩÆ‰∏≠Â∞ö‰∏çÂ≠òÂú®ÁöÑÊ®°ÂûãÈîÆÔºåÁî®Êà∑Â∑≤ÊîπËøáÁöÑ‰∏çË¶ÜÁõñ„ÄÇ
 * ÂøÖÈ°ªÂú®Ê≥®ÂÜå‰æßÊÝè‰πãÂâçË∞ÉÁî®„ÄÇ
 */
export async function seedModelInjections(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<void> {
  const stored = context.globalState.get<Record<string, string>>('modelInjections') ?? {};
  let changed = false;

  for (const [model, injection] of Object.entries(SEED_INJECTIONS)) {
    if (!(model in stored)) {
      stored[model] = injection;
      changed = true;
    }
  }

  if (changed) {
    await context.globalState.update('modelInjections', stored);
  }
}

/** ËØªÂèñÂÖ®Â±ÄÈÖçÁΩÆÔºàÂêàÂπ∂ globalState + secrets + Â∑•‰ΩúÂå∫ÈÖçÁΩÆÔºâ */
export async function readConfig(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext
): Promise<{
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}> {
  const vsConfig = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('imageFlow');
  const apiKey = (await context.secrets.get('imageFlow.apiKey')) ?? '';

  return {
    apiKey,
    baseUrl: context.globalState.get<string>('baseUrl') ?? vsConfig.get<string>('baseUrl') ?? 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
    model: context.globalState.get<string>('model') ?? vsConfig.get<string>('model') ?? 'nano-banana-2',
    aspectRatio: context.globalState.get<string>('aspectRatio') ?? vsConfig.get<string>('aspectRatio') ?? '3:4',
    imageSize: context.globalState.get<string>('imageSize') ?? vsConfig.get<string>('imageSize') ?? '1K',
    concurrency: context.globalState.get<number>('concurrency') ?? vsConfig.get<number>('concurrency') ?? 1,
    workbenchCols: context.globalState.get<number>('workbenchCols') ?? vsConfig.get<number>('workbenchCols') ?? 4,
    tasksCols: context.globalState.get<number>('tasksCols') ?? vsConfig.get<number>('tasksCols') ?? 2,
    modelInjections: context.globalState.get<Record<string, string>>('modelInjections') ?? {},
  };
}

/** ÂÜôÂÖ•ÂçïÂ≠óÊÆµ‚Äî‚Äîpatch Âà∞ globalStateÔºåapiKey ÁâπÊÆäÂ§ÑÁêÜËµ∞ secrets */

}
```

```typescript
/**

 * ÂøÖÈ°ªÂú®Ê≥®ÂÜå‰æßÊÝè‰πãÂâçË∞ÉÁî®„ÄÇ
 */
export async function seedModelInjections(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<void> {
  const stored = context.globalState.get<Record<string, string>>('modelInjections') ?? {};
  let changed = false;

  for (const [model, injection] of Object.entries(SEED_INJECTIONS)) {
    if (!(model in stored)) {
      stored[model] = injection;
      changed = true;
    }
  }

  if (changed) {
    await context.globalState.update('modelInjections', stored);
  }
}

/** ËØªÂèñÂÖ®Â±ÄÈÖçÁΩÆÔºàÂêàÂπ∂ globalState + secrets + Â∑•‰ΩúÂå∫ÈÖçÁΩÆÔºâ */
export async function readConfig(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext
): Promise<{
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}> {
  const vsConfig = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('imageFlow');
  const apiKey = (await context.secrets.get('imageFlow.apiKey')) ?? '';

  return {
    apiKey,
    baseUrl: context.globalState.get<string>('baseUrl') ?? vsConfig.get<string>('baseUrl') ?? 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
    model: context.globalState.get<string>('model') ?? vsConfig.get<string>('model') ?? 'nano-banana-2',
    aspectRatio: context.globalState.get<string>('aspectRatio') ?? vsConfig.get<string>('aspectRatio') ?? '3:4',
    imageSize: context.globalState.get<string>('imageSize') ?? vsConfig.get<string>('imageSize') ?? '1K',
    concurrency: context.globalState.get<number>('concurrency') ?? vsConfig.get<number>('concurrency') ?? 1,
    workbenchCols: context.globalState.get<number>('workbenchCols') ?? vsConfig.get<number>('workbenchCols') ?? 4,
    tasksCols: context.globalState.get<number>('tasksCols') ?? vsConfig.get<number>('tasksCols') ?? 2,
    modelInjections: context.globalState.get<Record<string, string>>('modelInjections') ?? {},
  };
}

/** ÂÜôÂÖ•ÂçïÂ≠óÊÆµ‚Äî‚Äîpatch Âà∞ globalStateÔºåapiKey ÁâπÊÆäÂ§ÑÁêÜËµ∞ secrets */
export async function writeConfigField(
```

> Base directory for this skill: /home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/eval-manual-superpowers-260611093413/.claude-home/skills/executing-plans
> 
> # Executing Plans
> 
> ## Overview
> 
> Load plan, review critically, execute all tasks, report when complete.
> 
> **Announce at start:** "I'm using the executing-plans skill to implement this plan."
> 
> **Note:** Tell your human partner that Superpowers works much better with access to subagents. The quality of its work will be significantly higher if run on a platform with subagent support (such as Claude Code or Codex). If subagents are available, use superpowers:subagent-driven-development instead of this skill.
> 
> ## The Process
> 
> ### Step 1: Load and Review Plan
> 1. Read plan file
> 2. Review critically - identify any questions or concerns about the plan
> 3. If concerns: Raise them with your human partner before starting
> 4. If no concerns: Create TodoWrite and proceed
> 
> ### Step 2: Execute Tasks
> 
> For each task:
> 1. Mark as in_progress
> 2. Follow each step exactly (plan has bite-sized steps)
> 3. Run verifications as specified
> 4. Mark as completed
> 
> ### Step 3: Complete Development
> 
> After all tasks complete and verified:
> - Announce: "I'm using the finishing-a-development-branch skill to complete this work."
> - **REQUIRED SUB-SKILL:** Use superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch
> - Follow that skill to verify tests, present options, execute choice
> 
> ## When to Stop and Ask for Help
> 
> **STOP executing immediately when:**
> - Hit a blocker (missing dependency, test fails, instruction unclear)
> - Plan has critical gaps preventing starting
> - You don't understand an instruction
> - Verification fails repeatedly
> 
> **Ask for clarification rather than guessing.**
> 
> ## When to Revisit Earlier Steps
> 
> **Return to Review (Step 1) when:**
> - Partner updates the plan based on your feedback
> - Fundamental approach needs rethinking
> 
> **Don't force through blockers** - stop and ask.
> 
> ## Remember
> - Review plan critically first
> - Follow plan steps exactly
> - Don't skip verifications
> - Reference skills when plan says to
> - Stop when blocked, don't guess
> - Never start implementation on main/master branch without explicit user consent
> 
> ## Integration
> 
> **Required workflow skills:**
> - **superpowers:using-git-worktrees** - Ensures isolated workspace (creates one or verifies existing)
> - **superpowers:writing-plans** - Creates the plan this skill executes
> - **superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch** - Complete development after all tasks
> 
> 
> ARGUMENTS: ÊåâËÆ°ÂàíÂÆûÊñΩ M3ÔºàÂºÇÊ≠•‰ªªÂä°Êú∫Âà∂ÔºâÔºöÊîπ‰∏∫ replyType:async Êèê‰∫§ + ÂçïÂÆöÊó∂Âô®ÂêéÂè∞ËΩÆËØ¢ + globalState ÊåÅ‰πÖÂåñ + ÈáçÂêØÁª≠ÊãâÔºõÂ§ö‰ªªÂä°Âπ∂Âèë‰∫í‰∏çÂπ≤Êâ∞„ÄÇÂÆåÊàêÂêéËá™Ë°åÈ™åËØÅÈÄöËøáÂÜçÁªìÊùüÊú¨ËΩÆÔºåÂÖ®Á®ã‰∏çÈúÄË¶ÅÂêëÊàëÁ°ÆËÆ§„ÄÇ

```typescript
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import * as vscode from 'vscode';

/**
 * ÊãºË£ÖÊúÄÁªà prompt:
 * ÊúÄÁªà prompt = Ê®°ÂûãÊ≥®ÂÖ•Âè• + Â∑•‰ΩúÂå∫ÊÝπ IMAGES.md + ÊõøÊç¢ÂêéÊ≠£Êñá
 * Á©∫Ë°åËøûÊé•ÔºåÁ©∫ÊÆµÁúÅÁï•
 */
export async function assemblePrompt(
  model: string,
  injections: Record<string, string>,
  body: string,
  mdDir: string
): Promise<string> {
  const parts: string[] = [];

  // Ê®°ÂûãÊ≥®ÂÖ•Âè•
  const injection = injections[model];
  if (injection) parts.push(injection);

  // IMAGES.md
  const workspaceFolder = vscode.workspace.getWorkspaceFolder(
    vscode.Uri.file(mdDir)
  );
  if (workspaceFolder) {
    const imagesPath = path.join(workspaceFolder.uri.fsPath, 'IMAGES.md');
    try {
      const content = fs.readFileSync(imagesPath, 'utf-8').trim();
      if (content) parts.push(content);
    } catch { /* ‰∏çÂ≠òÂú®ÔºåÈùôÈªòË∑≥Ëøá */ }
  }

  // Ê≠£Êñá
  if (body) parts.push(body);

  return parts.join('\n\n');
}

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdown } from './markdown-parser';
import { submitGenerate, queryResult, isTransientError } from './api';
import { extFromUrl } from './image-utils';
import { assemblePrompt } from './prompt-injection';
import { readConfig } from './config';
import type { TaskCardInfo } from './shared';

const STORAGE_KEY = 'runningTasks';
const POLL_INTERVAL = 4000;
const TASK_TIMEOUT = 10 * 60 * 1000; // 10 ÂàÜÈíü
const MAX_RETRY = 5;

interface JobState {
  index: number;
  id: string;
  status: 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  progress: number;
  error: string;
  transientRetries: number;
}

interface TaskState {
  folderName: string;
  mdDirectory: string;
  mdBaseName: string;
  model: string;
  startTime: number;
  sessionStartTime: number;
  jobs: JobState[];
  downloadedImages: string[];
}

export class TaskManager {
  private tasks: Map<string, TaskState> = new Map();
  private timer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null;
  private polling = false;
  private _onUpdate?: (tasks: TaskCardInfo[]) => void;

  constructor(private readonly context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {}

  set onUpdate(cb: (tasks: TaskCardInfo[]) => void) { this._onUpdate = cb; }

  /** ÊÅ¢Â§çÊåÅ‰πÖÂåñÁöÑËøõË°å‰∏≠‰ªªÂä° */
  async resume() {
    const stored = this.context.globalState.get<TaskState[]>(STORAGE_KEY) ?? [];
    const now = Date.now();
    for (const task of stored) {
      task.sessionStartTime = now;
      for (const job of task.jobs) {
        if (job.status === 'submitting') {
          job.status = 'failed';
          job.error = 'Êèê‰∫§Êú™ÂÆåÊàêÔºàÊâ©Â±ïÂ∑≤ÂÖ≥Èó≠Ôºâ';
        }
      }
      this.tasks.set(task.folderName, task);
    }
    this.emitUpdate();
    if (this.tasks.size > 0) {
      this.startPolling();
    }
  }

  private persist() {
    const arr = Array.from(this.tasks.values());
    void this.context.globalState.update(STORAGE_KEY, arr);
  }

  /** Êèê‰∫§Êñ∞‰ªªÂä° */
  async submit(mdUri: vscode.Uri): Promise<string> {
    const config = await readConfig(this.context);
    if (!config.apiKey) {
      throw new Error('ËØ∑ÂÖàËÆæÁΩÆ API Key');
    }

    const raw = fs.readFileSync(mdUri.fsPath, 'utf-8');
    if (raw.trim() === '') {
      throw new Error('ÂÜÖÂÆπ‰∏∫Á©∫');
    }

    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
    const { body, images, errors: parseErrors } = parseMarkdown(raw, mdDir);
    if (parseErrors.length > 0) {
      throw new Error(`ÂèÇËÄÉÂõæËØªÂèñÂ§±Ë¥•:\n${parseErrors.join('\n')}`);
    }

    const finalPrompt = await assemblePrompt(config.model, config.modelInjections, body, mdDir);

    const folderName = createTaskFolder(mdDir);

    const now = Date.now();
    const N = Math.min(config.concurrency, 10);
    const jobs: JobState[] = [];
    for (let i = 1; i <= N; i++) {
      jobs.push({
        index: i,
        id: '',
        status: 'submitting',
        progress: 0,
        error: '',
        transientRetries: 0,
      });
    }

    const task: TaskState = {
      folderName,
      mdDirectory: mdDir,
      mdBaseName: path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md'),
      model: config.model,
      startTime: now,
      sessionStartTime: now,
      jobs,
      downloadedImages: [],
    };

    // Á´ãÂç≥Âª∫Âç°ËøîÂõû
    this.tasks.set(folderName, task);
    this.persist();
    this.emitUpdate();
    this.startPolling();

    // ÂêéÂè∞Âπ∂ÂèëÂèëÂá∫ N ‰∏™ generate ËØ∑Ê±Ç
    const refImages = images.map(i => i.dataUri);
    for (const job of jobs) {
      this.submitJob(task, job, finalPrompt, refImages, config);
    }

    return folderName;
  }

  private async submitJob(
    task: TaskState,
    job: JobState,
    prompt: string,
    refImages: string[],
    config: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof readConfig>>
  ) {
    try {
      const jobId = await submitGenerate({
        baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
        apiKey: config.apiKey,
        model: config.model,
        prompt,
        images: refImages,
        aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
        imageSize: config.imageSize,
      });
      job.id = jobId;
      job.status = 'running';
      job.transientRetries = 0;
    } catch (err) {
      if (isTransientError(err) && job.transientRetries < MAX_RETRY) {
        job.transientRetries++;
        this.persist();
        return this.submitJob(task, job, prompt, refImages, config);
      }
      job.status = 'failed';
      job.error = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
    }
    this.persist();
    this.emitUpdate();

    // Ê£ÄÊü•ÊòØÂê¶ÂÖ®ÈÉ®Êèê‰∫§Â§±Ë¥•
    const allDone = task.jobs.every(j => j.status !== 'submitting');
    if (allDone) {
      const allFailed = task.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'failed');
      if (allFailed) {
        this.failTask(task);
      }
    }
  }

  private startPolling() {
    if (this.timer) return;
    this.timer = setInterval(() => {
      void this.pollAll();
    }, POLL_INTERVAL);
  }

  private stopPolling() {
    if (this.timer) {
      clearInterval(this.timer);
      this.timer = null;
    }
  }

  private async pollAll() {
    if (this.polling) return;
    this.polling = true;
    try {
      const config = await readConfig(this.context);
      const now = Date.now();

      for (const task of this.tasks.values()) {
        // Ë∂ÖÊó∂ÂÖúÂ∫ï
        if (now - task.sessionStartTime > TASK_TIMEOUT) {
          for (const job of task.jobs) {
            if (job.status === 'running' || job.status === 'submitting') {
              job.status = 'failed';
              job.error = '‰ªªÂä°Ë∂ÖÊó∂Ôºà10 ÂàÜÈíüÔºâ';
            }
          }
          this.finishTask(task);
          continue;
        }

        let allDone = true;
        for (const job of task.jobs) {
          if (job.status === 'running') {
            allDone = false;
            try {
              const result = await queryResult(config.baseUrl, config.apiKey, job.id);
              job.progress = result.progress ?? job.progress;

              if (result.status === 'succeeded' && result.results) {
                const folderPath = path.join(task.mdDirectory, task.folderName);
                for (const r of result.results) {
                  const seq = task.downloadedImages.length + 1;
                  const ext = extFromUrl(r.url);
                  const filename = `${task.mdBaseName}-${seq}.${ext}`;
                  const dest = path.join(folderPath, filename);
                  await downloadFile(r.url, dest);
                  task.downloadedImages.push(filename);
                }
                job.status = 'succeeded';
                job.progress = 100;
                job.transientRetries = 0;
              } else if (result.status === 'failed' || result.status === 'violation') {
                job.status = result.status;
                job.error = result.error ?? 'ÁîüÊàêÂ§±Ë¥•';
              }
            } catch (err) {
              if (isTransientError(err)) {
                allDone = false;
              } else {
                job.status = 'failed';
                job.error = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
              }
            }
          }

          if (job.status === 'submitting') {
            allDone = false;
          }
        }

        if (allDone) {
          this.finishTask(task);
        }
      }
      this.persist();
    } finally {
      this.polling = false;
    }
  }

  /** ‰ªªÂä°ÁªàÁªìÂ§ÑÁêÜ */
  private finishTask(task: TaskState) {
    const successCount = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length;
    const failedJobs = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation');
    const errors = [...new Set(failedJobs.map(j => j.error).filter(Boolean))];

    if (successCount === 0) {
      const folderPath = path.join(task.mdDirectory, task.folderName);
      try {
        if (fs.readdirSync(folderPath).length === 0) {
          fs.rmdirSync(folderPath);
        }
      } catch { /* ÂøΩÁï• */ }

      if (errors.length > 0) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
          `‰ªªÂä° ${task.folderName} ÂÖ®ÈÉ®Â§±Ë¥•: ${errors.join('; ')}`
        );
      }
    } else if (failedJobs.length > 0) {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
        `‰ªªÂä° ${task.folderName} ÂÆåÊàê ${successCount}/${task.jobs.length}Ôºå${failedJobs.length} ÂºÝÂ§±Ë¥•: ${errors.join('; ')}`
      );
    }

    this.tasks.delete(task.folderName);
    this.persist();
    this.emitUpdate();

    if (this.tasks.size === 0) {
      this.stopPolling();
    }
  }

  /** ÂÖ®ÈÉ®Êèê‰∫§Â§±Ë¥•‚Äî‚ÄîÊï¥‰ªªÂä°‰ΩúÂ∫ü */
  private failTask(task: TaskState) {
    const folderPath = path.join(task.mdDirectory, task.folderName);
    try {
      if (fs.readdirSync(folderPath).length === 0) {
        fs.rmdirSync(folderPath);
      }
    } catch { /* ÂøΩÁï• */ }

    const errors = [...new Set(task.jobs.map(j => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
    if (errors.length > 0) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
        `‰ªªÂä°Êèê‰∫§ÂÖ®ÈÉ®Â§±Ë¥•: ${errors.join('; ')}`
      );
    }

    this.tasks.delete(task.folderName);
    this.persist();
    this.emitUpdate();

    if (this.tasks.size === 0) {
      this.stopPolling();
    }
  }

  /** ËÆ°ÁÆóËÅöÂêàËøõÂ∫¶ */
  private calcProgress(task: TaskState): number {
    const N = task.jobs.length;
    if (N === 0) return 0;
    let total = 0;
    for (const job of task.jobs) {
      if (job.status === 'succeeded' || job.status === 'failed' || job.status === 'violation') {
        total += 100;
      } else if (job.status === 'running') {
        total += job.progress;
      }
    }
    return Math.round(total / N);
  }

  /** ÂèëÂ∞Ñ‰ªªÂä°Âç°ÂàóË°®ÁªôÂâçÁ´Ø */
  private emitUpdate() {
    if (!this._onUpdate) return;
    const cards: TaskCardInfo[] = Array.from(this.tasks.values()).map(t => ({
      folderName: t.folderName,
      model: t.model,
      status: t.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'submitting') ? 'submitting' :
              t.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'succeeded') ? 'done' : 'running',
      jobCount: t.jobs.length,
      doneCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length,
      failedCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length,
      progress: this.calcProgress(t),
      startTime: t.startTime,
      downloadedImages: t.downloadedImages,
      errors: t.jobs.map(j => j.error).filter(Boolean),
      isActive: true,
    }));
    cards.sort((a, b) => b.folderName.localeCompare(a.folderName));
    this._onUpdate(cards);
  }

  dispose() {
    this.stopPolling();
  }
}

// --- Â∑•ÂÖ∑ÂáΩÊï∞ ---

function pad(n: number): string { return String(n).padStart(2, '0'); }

function createTaskFolder(mdDir: string): string {
  const now = new Date();
  const ts = `${String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2)}${pad(now.getMonth() + 1)}${pad(now.getDate())}${pad(now.getHours())}${pad(now.getMinutes())}${pad(now.getSeconds())}`;
  let seq = 0;
  let name: string;
  do {
    seq++;
    name = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
  } while (fs.existsSync(path.join(mdDir, name)));
  fs.mkdirSync(path.join(mdDir, name));
  return name;
}

async function downloadFile(url: string, dest: string): Promise<void> {
  const res = await fetch(url);
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`‰∏ãËΩΩÂ§±Ë¥•: ${res.status}`);
  const buf = Buffer.from(await res.arrayBuffer());
  fs.writeFileSync(dest, buf);
}
```

### Hook ¬∑ SessionStart

`01:57:53`

ü™ù Hook ¬∑ `SessionStart`

````
<EXTREMELY_IMPORTANT>
You have superpowers.

**Below is the full content of your 'superpowers:using-superpowers' skill - your introduction to using skills. For all other skills, use the 'Skill' tool:**

---
name: using-superpowers
description: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring Skill tool invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions
---

<SUBAGENT-STOP>
If you were dispatched as a subagent to execute a specific task, skip this skill.
</SUBAGENT-STOP>

<EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT>
If you think there is even a 1% chance a skill might apply to what you are doing, you ABSOLUTELY MUST invoke the skill.

IF A SKILL APPLIES TO YOUR TASK, YOU DO NOT HAVE A CHOICE. YOU MUST USE IT.

This is not negotiable. This is not optional. You cannot rationalize your way out of this.
</EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT>

## Instruction Priority

Superpowers skills override default system prompt behavior, but **user instructions always take precedence**:

1. **User's explicit instructions** (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, AGENTS.md, direct requests) ‚Äî highest priority
2. **Superpowers skills** ‚Äî override default system behavior where they conflict
3. **Default system prompt** ‚Äî lowest priority

If CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, or AGENTS.md says "don't use TDD" and a skill says "always use TDD," follow the user's instructions. The user is in control.

## How to Access Skills

**In Claude Code:** Use the `Skill` tool. When you invoke a skill, its content is loaded and presented to you‚Äîfollow it directly. Never use the Read tool on skill files.

**In Copilot CLI:** Use the `skill` tool. Skills are auto-discovered from installed plugins. The `skill` tool works the same as Claude Code's `Skill` tool.

**In Gemini CLI:** Skills activate via the `activate_skill` tool. Gemini loads skill metadata at session start and activates the full content on demand.

**In other environments:** Check your platform's documentation for how skills are loaded.

## Platform Adaptation

Skills use Claude Code tool names. Non-CC platforms: see `references/copilot-tools.md` (Copilot CLI), `references/codex-tools.md` (Codex) for tool equivalents. Gemini CLI users get the tool mapping loaded automatically via GEMINI.md.

# Using Skills

## The Rule

**Invoke relevant or requested skills BEFORE any response or action.** Even a 1% chance a skill might apply means that you should invoke the skill to check. If an invoked skill turns out to be wrong for the situation, you don't need to use it.

```dot
digraph skill_flow {
    "User message received" [shape=doublecircle];
    "About to EnterPlanMode?" [shape=doublecircle];
    "Already brainstormed?" [shape=diamond];
    "Invoke brainstorming skill" [shape=box];
    "Might any skill apply?" [shape=diamond];
    "Invoke Skill tool" [shape=box];
    "Announce: 'Using [skill] to [purpose]'" [shape=box];
    "Has checklist?" [shape=diamond];
    "Create TodoWrite todo per item" [shape=box];
    "Follow skill exactly" [shape=box];
    "Respond (including clarifications)" [shape=doublecircle];

    "About to EnterPlanMode?" -> "Already brainstormed?";
    "Already brainstormed?" -> "Invoke brainstorming skill" [label="no"];
    "Already brainstormed?" -> "Might any skill apply?" [label="yes"];
    "Invoke brainstorming skill" -> "Might any skill apply?";

    "User message received" -> "Might any skill apply?";
    "Might any skill apply?" -> "Invoke Skill tool" [label="yes, even 1%"];
    "Might any skill apply?" -> "Respond (including clarifications)" [label="definitely not"];
    "Invoke Skill tool" -> "Announce: 'Using [skill] to [purpose]'";
    "Announce: 'Using [skill] to [purpose]'" -> "Has checklist?";
    "Has checklist?" -> "Create TodoWrite todo per item" [label="yes"];
    "Has checklist?" -> "Follow skill exactly" [label="no"];
    "Create TodoWrite todo per item" -> "Follow skill exactly";
}
```

## Red Flags

These thoughts mean STOP‚Äîyou're rationalizing:

| Thought | Reality |
|---------|---------|
| "This is just a simple question" | Questions are tasks. Check for skills. |
| "I need more context first" | Skill check comes BEFORE clarifying questions. |
| "Let me explore the codebase first" | Skills tell you HOW to explore. Check first. |
| "I can check git/files quickly" | Files lack conversation context. Check for skills. |
| "Let me gather information first" | Skills tell you HOW to gather information. |
| "This doesn't need a formal skill" | If a skill exists, use it. |
| "I remember this skill" | Skills evolve. Read current version. |
| "This doesn't count as a task" | Action = task. Check for skills. |
| "The skill is overkill" | Simple things become complex. Use it. |
| "I'll just do this one thing first" | Check BEFORE doing anything. |
| "This feels productive" | Undisciplined action wastes time. Skills prevent this. |
| "I know what that means" | Knowing the concept ‚âÝ using the skill. Invoke it. |

## Skill Priority

When multiple skills could apply, use this order:

1. **Process skills first** (brainstorming, debugging) - these determine HOW to approach the task
2. **Implementation skills second** (frontend-design, mcp-builder) - these guide execution

"Let's build X" ‚Üí brainstorming first, then implementation skills.
"Fix this bug" ‚Üí debugging first, then domain-specific skills.

## Skill Types

**Rigid** (TDD, debugging): Follow exactly. Don't adapt away discipline.

**Flexible** (patterns): Adapt principles to context.

The skill itself tells you which.

## User Instructions

Instructions say WHAT, not HOW. "Add X" or "Fix Y" doesn't mean skip workflows.


</EXTREMELY_IMPORTANT>
````

> `assemblePrompt` is now synchronous, but it's OK to `await` a non-Promise value ‚Äî it just returns the value immediately. TypeScript doesn't consider this an error, and ESLint won't flag it either (it's not `@typescript-eslint/await-thenable`). The `await` on a sync function is harmless ‚Äî it will just pass through the result. Actually, let me reconsider... will `await` on a sync return value cause issues?
```typescript
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import * as vscode from 'vscode';

/**
 * ÊãºË£ÖÊúÄÁªà prompt:
 * ÊúÄÁªà prompt = Ê®°ÂûãÊ≥®ÂÖ•Âè• + Â∑•‰ΩúÂå∫ÊÝπ IMAGES.md + ÊõøÊç¢ÂêéÊ≠£Êñá
 * Á©∫Ë°åËøûÊé•ÔºåÁ©∫ÊÆµÁúÅÁï•
 */
export function assemblePrompt(
  model: string,
  injections: Record<string, string>,
  body: string,
  mdDir: string
): Promise<string> {
  const parts: string[] = [];

  // Ê®°ÂûãÊ≥®ÂÖ•Âè•
  const injection = injections[model];
  if (injection) parts.push(injection);

  // IMAGES.md
  const workspaceFolder = vscode.workspace.getWorkspaceFolder(
    vscode.Uri.file(mdDir)
  );
  if (workspaceFolder) {
    const imagesPath = path.join(workspaceFolder.uri.fsPath, 'IMAGES.md');
    try {
      const content = fs.readFileSync(imagesPath, 'utf-8').trim();
      if (content) parts.push(content);
    } catch { /* ‰∏çÂ≠òÂú®ÔºåÈùôÈªòË∑≥Ëøá */ }
  }

  // Ê≠£Êñá
  if (body) parts.push(body);

  return parts.join('\n\n');
}

```
</details>

````markdown
### Task M3.0: ÂºÇÊ≠•‰ªªÂä°ÁÆ°ÁêÜÂô® ‚Äî ÊÝ∏ÂøÉÈÄªËæë

**Files:**
- Create: `src/task-manager.ts`

Áî±‰∫é task-manager.ts ÊòØ‰∏Ä‰∏™ËæÉÂ§ßÁöÑÊÝ∏ÂøÉÊñá‰ª∂Ôºå‰∏ãÈù¢ÊåâÂäüËÉΩÂå∫ÂüüÂàÜÈÉ®ÁªôÂá∫„ÄÇÈúÄË¶ÅÂú®‰∏Ä‰∏™Êñá‰ª∂‰∏≠ÂÆûÁé∞„ÄÇ

- [ ] **Step 1: ÁºñÂÜô task-manager.tsÔºàÂÆåÊï¥Êñá‰ª∂Ôºâ**

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdown } from './markdown-parser';
import { submitGenerate, queryResult, ApiError, isTransientError } from './api';
import { extFromUrl, modelFamily } from './image-utils';
import { assemblePrompt } from './prompt-injection';
import { readConfig } from './config';
import { TaskCardInfo } from './shared';

const STORAGE_KEY = 'runningTasks';
const POLL_INTERVAL = 4000;
const TASK_TIMEOUT = 10 * 60 * 1000; // 10 ÂàÜÈíü
const MAX_RETRY = 5; // Áû¨Êó∂ÈîôËØØÊúÄÂ§ßÈáçËØïÊ¨°Êï∞ÔºàÊØèÊ¨°ËΩÆËØ¢ÈáçËØï‰∏ÄÂõûÔºâ

interface JobState {
  index: number;          // 1-based
  id: string;             // job id (submitting ÊÄÅ‰∏∫Á©∫)
  status: 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  progress: number;
  error: string;
  transientRetries: number;
}

interface TaskState {
  folderName: string;
  mdDirectory: string;
  mdBaseName: string;
  model: string;
  startTime: number;       // ÁúüÂÆûÊèê‰∫§Êó∂Èó¥ÔºàmsÔºâ
  sessionStartTime: number; // Êú¨Ê¨°‰ºöËØùÂºÄÂßãÊó∂Èó¥ÔºàmsÔºåÁî®‰∫éË∂ÖÊó∂Âà§ÂÆöÔºâ
  jobs: JobState[];
  downloadedImages: string[]; // Â∑≤ÂÆåÊàê‰∏ãËΩΩÁöÑÁõ∏ÂØπË∑ØÂæÑ
}

export class TaskManager {
  private tasks: Map<string, TaskState> = new Map(); // key = folderName
  private timer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null;
  private polling = false; // ÈáçÂÖ•ÈîÅ
  private _onUpdate?: (tasks: TaskCardInfo[]) => void;
  private _onStatusMsg?: (msg: string) => void;

  constructor(private readonly context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {}

  set onUpdate(cb: (tasks: TaskCardInfo[]) => void) { this._onUpdate = cb; }
  set onStatusMsg(cb: (msg: string) => void) { this._onStatusMsg = cb; }

  /** ÊÅ¢Â§çÊåÅ‰πÖÂåñÁöÑËøõË°å‰∏≠‰ªªÂä° */
  async resume() {
    const stored = this.context.globalState.get<TaskState[]>(STORAGE_KEY) ?? [];
    const now = Date.now();
    for (const task of stored) {
      // ÈáçÂêØÂêéÈáçÁΩÆË∂ÖÊó∂ËÆ°Êó∂Áî®‰ºöËØùÊó∂Èó¥
      task.sessionStartTime = now;
      // submitting ÊÄÅ job ÈáçÂêØÂêéÁõ¥Êé•Âà§Â§±Ë¥•
      for (const job of task.jobs) {
        if (job.status === 'submitting') {
          job.status = 'failed';
          job.error = 'Êèê‰∫§Êú™ÂÆåÊàêÔºàÊâ©Â±ïÂ∑≤ÂÖ≥Èó≠Ôºâ';
        }
      }
      this.tasks.set(task.folderName, task);
    }
    this.emitUpdate();
    if (this.tasks.size > 0) {
      this.startPolling();
    }
  }

  /** ÊåÅ‰πÖÂåñÂΩìÂâç‰ªªÂä° */
  private persist() {
    const arr = Array.from(this.tasks.values());
    this.context.globalState.update(STORAGE_KEY, arr);
  }

  /** Êèê‰∫§Êñ∞‰ªªÂä° */
  async submit(mdUri: vscode.Uri) {
    const config = await readConfig(this.context);
    if (!config.apiKey) {
      throw new Error('ËØ∑ÂÖàËÆæÁΩÆ API Key');
    }

    const raw = fs.readFileSync(mdUri.fsPath, 'utf-8');
    if (raw.trim() === '') {
      throw new Error('ÂÜÖÂÆπ‰∏∫Á©∫');
    }

    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
    const { body, images, errors: parseErrors } = parseMarkdown(raw, mdDir);
    if (parseErrors.length > 0) {
      throw new Error(`ÂèÇËÄÉÂõæËØªÂèñÂ§±Ë¥•:\n${parseErrors.join('\n')}`);
    }

    const finalPrompt = await assemblePrompt(config.model, config.modelInjections, body, mdDir);

    const folderName = createTaskFolder(mdDir);

    const now = Date.now();
    const N = Math.min(config.concurrency, 10);
    const jobs: JobState[] = [];
    for (let i = 1; i <= N; i++) {
      jobs.push({
        index: i,
        id: '',
        status: 'submitting',
        progress: 0,
        error: '',
        transientRetries: 0,
      });
    }

    const task: TaskState = {
      folderName,
      mdDirectory: mdDir,
      mdBaseName: path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md'),
      model: config.model,
      startTime: now,
      sessionStartTime: now,
      jobs,
      downloadedImages: [],
    };

    this.tasks.set(folderName, task);
    this.persist();
    this.emitUpdate();
    this.startPolling();

    // ÂêéÂè∞Âπ∂ÂèëÂèëÂá∫ N ‰∏™ generate ËØ∑Ê±Ç
    for (const job of jobs) {
      this.submitJob(task, job, finalPrompt, images.map(i => i.dataUri), config);
    }
  }

  private async submitJob(
    task: TaskState,
    job: JobState,
    prompt: string,
    refImages: string[],
    config: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof readConfig>>
  ) {
    try {
      const jobId = await submitGenerate({
        baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
        apiKey: config.apiKey,
        model: config.model,
        prompt,
        images: refImages,
        aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
        imageSize: config.imageSize,
      });
      job.id = jobId;
      job.status = 'running';
      job.transientRetries = 0;
    } catch (err) {
      if (isTransientError(err) && job.transientRetries < MAX_RETRY) {
        job.transientRetries++;
        // ÈáçËØïÊèê‰∫§
        this.persist();
        return this.submitJob(task, job, prompt, refImages, config);
      }
      job.status = 'failed';
      job.error = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
    }
    this.persist();
    this.emitUpdate();

    // Ê£ÄÊü•ÊòØÂê¶ÂÖ®ÈÉ®Êèê‰∫§Â§±Ë¥•
    const allDone = task.jobs.every(j => j.status !== 'submitting');
    if (allDone) {
      const allFailed = task.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'failed');
      if (allFailed) {
        this.failTask(task, true);
      }
    }
  }

  /** ËΩÆËØ¢ */
  private startPolling() {
    if (this.timer) return;
    this.timer = setInterval(() => this.pollAll(), POLL_INTERVAL);
  }

  private stopPolling() {
    if (this.timer) {
      clearInterval(this.timer);
      this.timer = null;
    }
  }

  private async pollAll() {
````

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/eval-manual-superpowers-260611093413/docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-11-image-flow-m1-m8.md</code></summary>

````markdown
  private async pollAll() {
    if (this.polling) return; // ÈáçÂÖ•ÈîÅ
    this.polling = true;
    try {
      const config = await readConfig(this.context);
      const now = Date.now();

      for (const task of this.tasks.values()) {
        // Ë∂ÖÊó∂ÂÖúÂ∫ï
        if (now - task.sessionStartTime > TASK_TIMEOUT) {
          for (const job of task.jobs) {
            if (job.status === 'running' || job.status === 'submitting') {
              job.status = 'failed';
              job.error = '‰ªªÂä°Ë∂ÖÊó∂Ôºà10 ÂàÜÈíüÔºâ';
            }
          }
          this.finishTask(task);
          continue;
        }

        let allDone = true;
        for (const job of task.jobs) {
          if (job.status === 'running') {
            allDone = false;
            try {
              const result = await queryResult(config.baseUrl, config.apiKey, job.id);
              job.progress = result.progress ?? job.progress;

              if (result.status === 'succeeded' && result.results) {
                // ‰∏ãËΩΩÂõæÁâá
                for (const r of result.results) {
                  const seq = task.downloadedImages.length + 1;
                  const ext = extFromUrl(r.url);
                  const filename = `${task.mdBaseName}-${seq}.${ext}`;
                  const dest = path.join(task.mdDirectory, task.folderName, filename);
                  await downloadFile(r.url, dest);
                  task.downloadedImages.push(filename);
                }
                job.status = 'succeeded';
                job.progress = 100;
                job.transientRetries = 0;
              } else if (result.status === 'failed' || result.status === 'violation') {
                job.status = result.status as 'failed';
                job.error = result.error ?? 'ÁîüÊàêÂ§±Ë¥•';
              }
            } catch (err) {
              if (isTransientError(err)) {
                // Áû¨Êó∂ÈîôËØØÔºö‰øùÊåÅ runningÔºå‰∏ãËΩÆÈáçËØï
                allDone = false;
              } else {
                job.status = 'failed';
                job.error = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
              }
            }
          }

          if (job.status === 'submitting') {
            allDone = false;
          }
        }

        if (allDone) {
          this.finishTask(task);
        }
      }
      this.persist();
    } finally {
      this.polling = false;
    }
  }

  /** ‰ªªÂä°ÁªàÁªìÂ§ÑÁêÜ */
  private finishTask(task: TaskState) {
    const successCount = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length;
    const failedJobs = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation');
    const errors = [...new Set(failedJobs.map(j => j.error).filter(Boolean))];

    if (successCount === 0) {
      // ÊóÝÊàêÂõæ ‚Üí ÈîôËØØÈÄöÁü• + ÂàÝÈô§Á©∫Êñá‰ª∂Â§π
      const folderPath = path.join(task.mdDirectory, task.folderName);
      try {
        if (fs.readdirSync(folderPath).length === 0) {
          fs.rmdirSync(folderPath);
        }
      } catch { /* ÂøΩÁï• */ }

      if (errors.length > 0) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
          `‰ªªÂä° ${task.folderName} ÂÖ®ÈÉ®Â§±Ë¥•: ${errors.join('; ')}`
        );
      }
    } else if (failedJobs.length > 0) {
      // ÊúâÊàêÂõæ‰ΩÜÊúâÂ§±Ë¥• ‚Üí Ë≠¶ÂëäÈÄöÁü•
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
        `‰ªªÂä° ${task.folderName} ÂÆåÊàê ${successCount}/${task.jobs.length} ÂºÝÔºå${failedJobs.length} ÂºÝÂ§±Ë¥•: ${errors.join('; ')}`
      );
    }

    this.tasks.delete(task.folderName);
    this.persist();
    this.emitUpdate();

    if (this.tasks.size === 0) {
      this.stopPolling();
    }
  }

  /** ÂÖ®ÈÉ®Êèê‰∫§Â§±Ë¥•‚Äî‚ÄîÊï¥‰ªªÂä°‰ΩúÂ∫ü */
  private failTask(task: TaskState, notify: boolean = true) {
    const folderPath = path.join(task.mdDirectory, task.folderName);
    try {
      if (fs.readdirSync(folderPath).length === 0) {
        fs.rmdirSync(folderPath);
      }
    } catch { /* ÂøΩÁï• */ }

    const errors = [...new Set(task.jobs.map(j => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
    if (notify && errors.length > 0) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
        `‰ªªÂä°Êèê‰∫§ÂÖ®ÈÉ®Â§±Ë¥•: ${errors.join('; ')}`
      );
    }

    this.tasks.delete(task.folderName);
    this.persist();
    this.emitUpdate();

    if (this.tasks.size === 0) {
      this.stopPolling();
    }
  }

  /** ËÆ°ÁÆóËÅöÂêàËøõÂ∫¶ */
  private calcProgress(task: TaskState): number {
    const N = task.jobs.length;
    if (N === 0) return 0;
    let total = 0;
    for (const job of task.jobs) {
      if (job.status === 'succeeded' || job.status === 'failed' || job.status === 'violation') {
        total += 100;
      } else if (job.status === 'running') {
        total += job.progress;
      }
      // submitting ‚Üí 0
    }
    return Math.round(total / N);
  }

  /** ÂèëÂ∞Ñ‰ªªÂä°Âç°ÂàóË°®ÁªôÂâçÁ´Ø */
  private emitUpdate() {
    if (!this._onUpdate) return;
    const cards: TaskCardInfo[] = Array.from(this.tasks.values()).map(t => ({
      folderName: t.folderName,
      model: t.model,
      status: t.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'submitting') ? 'submitting' as const : 'running' as const,
      jobCount: t.jobs.length,
      doneCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length,
      failedCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length,
      progress: this.calcProgress(t),
      startTime: t.startTime,
      downloadedImages: t.downloadedImages,
      errors: t.jobs.map(j => j.error).filter(Boolean),
      isActive: true,
    }));
    cards.sort((a, b) => b.folderName.localeCompare(a.folderName)); // ÂÄíÂ∫è
    this._onUpdate(cards);
  }

  dispose() {
    this.stopPolling();
  }
}

// --- Â∑•ÂÖ∑ÂáΩÊï∞ÔºàÂú® extension.ts ÊàñÂÖ∂‰ªñÂú∞ÊñπÂÖ±‰∫´Ôºâ---

function pad(n: number): string { return String(n).padStart(2, '0'); }

function createTaskFolder(mdDir: string): string {
  const now = new Date();
  const ts = `${String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2)}${pad(now.getMonth() + 1)}${pad(now.getDate())}${pad(now.getHours())}${pad(now.getMinutes())}${pad(now.getSeconds())}`;
  let seq = 0;
  let name: string;
  do {
    seq++;
    name = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
  } while (fs.existsSync(path.join(mdDir, name)));
  fs.mkdirSync(path.join(mdDir, name));
  return name;
}

async function downloadFile(url: string, dest: string): Promise<void> {
  const res = await fetch(url);
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`‰∏ãËΩΩÂ§±Ë¥•: ${res.status}`);
  const buf = Buffer.from(await res.arrayBuffer());
  fs.writeFileSync(dest, buf);
}
```

- [ ] **Step 2: ÂàõÂª∫ prompt-injection.tsÔºàM6 ÂâçÁΩÆ‰æùËµñ‚Äî‚ÄîM3 Âè™ÈúÄÁ©∫Â£≥Ôºâ**

```typescript
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import * as vscode from 'vscode';

/**
 * ÊãºË£ÖÊúÄÁªà prompt:
 * ÊúÄÁªà prompt = Ê®°ÂûãÊ≥®ÂÖ•Âè• + Â∑•‰ΩúÂå∫ÊÝπ IMAGES.md + ÊõøÊç¢ÂêéÊ≠£Êñá
 * Á©∫Ë°åËøûÊé•ÔºåÁ©∫ÊÆµÁúÅÁï•
 */
export async function assemblePrompt(
  model: string,
  injections: Record<string, string>,
  body: string,
  mdDir: string
): Promise<string> {
  const parts: string[] = [];

  // Ê®°ÂûãÊ≥®ÂÖ•Âè•
  const injection = injections[model];
  if (injection) parts.push(injection);

  // IMAGES.md
  const workspaceFolder = vscode.workspace.getWorkspaceFolder(
    vscode.Uri.file(mdDir)
  );
  if (workspaceFolder) {
    const imagesPath = path.join(workspaceFolder.uri.fsPath, 'IMAGES.md');
    try {
      const content = fs.readFileSync(imagesPath, 'utf-8').trim();
      if (content) parts.push(content);
    } catch { /* ‰∏çÂ≠òÂú®ÔºåÈùôÈªòË∑≥Ëøá */ }
  }

  // Ê≠£Êñá
  if (body) parts.push(body);

  return parts.join('\n\n');
}
```
````

````markdown
```typescript
suite('progress calculation', () => {
  function calcProgress(jobs: { status: string; progress: number }[]): number {
    const N = jobs.length;
    if (N === 0) return 0;
    let total = 0;
    for (const job of jobs) {
      if (job.status === 'succeeded' || job.status === 'failed' || job.status === 'violation') {
        total += 100;
      } else if (job.status === 'running') {
        total += job.progress;
      }
    }
    return Math.round(total / N);
  }

  test('ÂÖ® submitting ËÆ° 0', () => {
    const jobs = [{ status: 'submitting', progress: 0 }, { status: 'submitting', progress: 0 }];
    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(jobs), 0);
  });

  test('Ê∑∑ÂêàÊÄÅ', () => {
    const jobs = [
      { status: 'succeeded', progress: 100 },
      { status: 'running', progress: 50 },
      { status: 'submitting', progress: 0 },
      { status: 'failed', progress: 0 },
    ];
    // (100 + 50 + 0 + 100) / 4 = 62.5 ‚Üí 63
    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(jobs), 63);
  });

  test('ÂÖ®ÈÉ®ÁªàÁªì = 100', () => {
    const jobs = [{ status: 'succeeded', progress: 100 }, { status: 'failed', progress: 0 }];
    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(jobs), 100);
  });
});

‰øÆÊîπ `src/extension.ts`Ôºö

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdown } from './markdown-parser';
import { submitGenerate, queryResult, ApiError } from './api';
import { extFromUrl } from './image-utils';
import { seedModelInjections } from './config';
import { TaskManager } from './task-manager';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebar-provider';

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
  // ÂÖàÁßçÂÖ•ÁßçÂ≠êÔºàÂú®Ê≥®ÂÜå‰æßÊÝè‰πãÂâçÔºâ
  seedModelInjections(context);

  const taskManager = new TaskManager(context);
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context, taskManager);

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider)
  );

  // Áª≠ÊãâÊú™ÂÆåÊàê‰ªªÂä°
  taskManager.resume();

  // M1 ÂêåÊ≠•ÁîüÊàêÂëΩ‰ª§Êîπ‰∏∫ÂºÇÊ≠•Ê®°Âºè
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      const mdUri = uri ?? vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
      if (!mdUri || !mdUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage('ËØ∑Âè≥ÈîÆÁÇπÂáª Markdown Êñá‰ª∂ÊàñÊâìÂºÄ .md Êñá‰ª∂ÂêéÊâßË°å');
        return;
      }

      try {
        await taskManager.submit(mdUri);
      } catch (err) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
          err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)
        );
      }
    })
  );

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage('previewRequest - ÂæÖÂÆûÁé∞');
    })
  );

  context.subscriptions.push(taskManager);
}

export function deactivate() {}
```

constructor(
  private readonly context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  private readonly taskManager: TaskManager
) {
  this._extensionUri = context.extensionUri;
  taskManager.onUpdate = (tasks) => {
    if (this._view) {
      this.postMessage(this._view.webview, { type: 'taskUpdate', tasks });
    }
  };
}

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { isImageExt } from './image-utils';

const MAX_DEPTH = 3;
const MAX_ENTRIES = 500;

/** ÈÄíÂΩíÊâ´ÊèèÂõæÁâáÔºà‰∏äÈôê3Â±Ç„ÄÅ500Êù°ÁõÆÔºâ */
export function scanFolder(folderPath: string): string[] {
  const result: string[] = [];
  const stack: { dir: string; depth: number }[] = [{ dir: folderPath, depth: 0 }];

  while (stack.length > 0 && result.length < MAX_ENTRIES) {
    const { dir, depth } = stack.pop()!;
    if (depth > MAX_DEPTH) continue;

    let entries: fs.Dirent[];
    try {
      entries = fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
    } catch {
      continue;
    }

    for (const entry of entries) {
      if (result.length >= MAX_ENTRIES) break;
      const fullPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);

      if (entry.isDirectory() && depth < MAX_DEPTH) {
        stack.push({ dir: fullPath, depth: depth + 1 });
      } else if (entry.isFile() && isImageExt(path.extname(entry.name))) {
        result.push(fullPath);
      }
    }
  }

  return result;
}

): string[] {

  let current = path.dirname(mdPath);

  while (current !== workspaceRoot && current !== path.dirname(current)) {
````

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { seedModelInjections } from './config';
import { TaskManager } from './task-manager';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebar-provider';

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
  // ÂÖàÁßçÂÖ•ÁßçÂ≠êÔºàÂøÖÈ°ªÂú®Ê≥®ÂÜå‰æßÊÝè‰πãÂâçÔºâ
  void seedModelInjections(context);

  const taskManager = new TaskManager(context);
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context, taskManager);

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider)
  );

  // Áª≠ÊãâÊú™ÂÆåÊàê‰ªªÂä°
  taskManager.resume();

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      const mdUri = uri ?? vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
      if (!mdUri || !mdUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage('ËØ∑Âè≥ÈîÆÁÇπÂáª Markdown Êñá‰ª∂ÊàñÊâìÂºÄ .md Êñá‰ª∂ÂêéÊâßË°å');
        return;
      }

      try {
        await taskManager.submit(mdUri);
      } catch (err) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
          err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)
        );
      }
    })
  );

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', (_uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage('previewRequest - ÂæÖÂÆûÁé∞');
    })
  );

  context.subscriptions.push(taskManager);
}

export function deactivate() {}

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { readConfig, writeConfigField } from './config';
import type { FrontendMessage, InitData, BackendMessage, TaskCardInfo } from './shared';
import type { TaskManager } from './task-manager';

export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;
  private _effectiveMd = '';
  private _extensionUri: vscode.Uri;
  private _currentTasks: TaskCardInfo[] = [];

  constructor(
    private readonly context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
    taskManager: TaskManager
  ) {
    this._extensionUri = context.extensionUri;
    taskManager.onUpdate = (tasks) => {
      this._currentTasks = tasks;
      if (this._view) {
        this.postMessage(this._view.webview, { type: 'taskUpdate', tasks });
      }
    };
  }

  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView) {
    this._view = webviewView;

    webviewView.webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: this.buildLocalResourceRoots(),
    };

    webviewView.webview.html = this.getHtml(webviewView.webview);

    webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage(async (msg: FrontendMessage) => {
      await this.handleMessage(msg, webviewView.webview);
    });
  }

  private buildLocalResourceRoots(): vscode.Uri[] {
    const roots = [
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._extensionUri, 'media'),
    ];
    const workspaceFolders = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders;
    if (workspaceFolders) {
      for (const folder of workspaceFolders) {
        roots.push(folder.uri);
      }
    }
    return roots;
  }

  private getHtml(webview: vscode.Webview): string {
    const nonce = getNonce();
    const scriptUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js')
    );
    const styleUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css')
    );

    return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
        content="default-src 'none';
                 img-src ${webview.cspSource} data: https:;
                 style-src ${webview.cspSource} 'unsafe-inline';
                 script-src 'nonce-${nonce}';">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${styleUri.toString()}">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${scriptUri.toString()}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }

  private async handleMessage(msg: FrontendMessage, webview: vscode.Webview) {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init': {
        await this.sendInitData(webview);
        break;
      }
      case 'setConfig': {
        await writeConfigField(this.context, msg.key, msg.value);
        const config = await readConfig(this.context);
        this.postMessage(webview, { type: 'configUpdate', config });
        break;
      }
      case 'setApiKey': {
        await this.context.secrets.store('imageFlow.apiKey', msg.key);
        break;
      }
      case 'openInBrowser': {
        vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(msg.url));
        break;
      }
      default:
        break;
    }
  }

  private async sendInitData(webview: vscode.Webview) {
    const config = await readConfig(this.context);
    const assetFolders: string[] = this.context.workspaceState.get('assetFolders') ?? [];
    const data: InitData = {
      config: { ...config, apiKey: config.apiKey ? '‚Ä¢‚Ä¢‚Ä¢‚Ä¢‚Ä¢‚Ä¢‚Ä¢‚Ä¢' : '' },
      effectiveMd: this._effectiveMd,
      tasks: this._currentTasks,
      assetFolders,
    };
    this.postMessage(webview, { type: 'initData', data });
  }

  private postMessage(webview: vscode.Webview, msg: BackendMessage) {
    webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  /** Â§ñÈÉ®ËÆæÁΩÆÁîüÊïà MD */
  setEffectiveMd(mdPath: string) {
    this._effectiveMd = mdPath;
    if (this._view) {
      this.postMessage(this._view.webview, { type: 'effectiveMdChange', path: mdPath });
    }
  }

  /** Â§ñÈÉ®Êé®ÈÄÅ‰ªªÂä°Êõ¥Êñ∞ */
  setTasks(tasks: TaskCardInfo[]) {
    this._currentTasks = tasks;
    if (this._view) {
      this.postMessage(this._view.webview, { type: 'taskUpdate', tasks });
    }
  }
}

function getNonce(): string {
  let text = '';
  const possible = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
  for (let i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
    text += possible.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * possible.length));
  }
  return text;
}

```
</details>

```typescript
import * as assert from 'assert';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import * as os from 'os';
import { parseMarkdown } from './markdown-parser';

suite('markdown-parser', () => {
  let tmpDir: string;

  setup(() => {
    tmpDir = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'image-flow-test-'));
  });

  teardown(() => {
    fs.rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true });
  });

  function makeImg(name: string) {
    fs.writeFileSync(path.join(tmpDir, name), Buffer.from([0x89, 0x50, 0x4e, 0x47]));
  }

  test('ÊôÆÈÄöË∑ØÂæÑËß£Êûê', () => {
    makeImg('ref.png');
    const raw = 'ÁîüÊàê‰∏ÄÂºÝÂõæÔºåÂèÇËÄÉ ![alt](ref.png) È£éÊÝº';
    const { body, images, errors } = parseMarkdown(raw, tmpDir);
    assert.strictEqual(errors.length, 0);
    assert.strictEqual(images.length, 1);
    assert.strictEqual(images[0].index, 1);
    assert.strictEqual(images[0].path, 'ref.png');
    assert.ok(images[0].dataUri.startsWith('data:image/png;base64,'));
    assert.strictEqual(body, 'ÁîüÊàê‰∏ÄÂºÝÂõæÔºåÂèÇËÄÉ [image1](ref) È£éÊÝº');
  });

  test('Â∞ñÊã¨Âè∑Ë∑ØÂæÑÂê´Á©∫ÊÝº', () => {
    makeImg('my ref (1).png');
    const raw = 'ÊµãËØï ![desc](<my ref (1).png>) ÂõæÁâá';
    const { body, images, errors } = parseMarkdown(raw, tmpDir);
    assert.strictEqual(errors.length, 0);
    assert.strictEqual(images.length, 1);
    assert.strictEqual(images[0].path, 'my ref (1).png');
    assert.strictEqual(body, 'ÊµãËØï [image1](my ref (1)) ÂõæÁâá');
  });

  test('ÈáçÂ§çÂºïÁî®Â§çÁî®ÁºñÂè∑', () => {
    makeImg('a.png');
    const raw = '![x](a.png) ‰∏≠Èó¥ ![y](a.png) ÂÜçÁî® ![z](a.png)';
    const { body, images, errors } = parseMarkdown(raw, tmpDir);
    assert.strictEqual(errors.length, 0);
    assert.strictEqual(images.length, 1);
    assert.strictEqual(images[0].index, 1);
    assert.ok(body.includes('[image1](a)'));
    const matches = body.match(/\[image1\]/g);
    assert.strictEqual(matches?.length, 3);
  });

  test('Â§öÂõæÁâáÁºñÂè∑‰∏éÈ°∫Â∫è‰∏ÄËá¥', () => {
    makeImg('first.jpg');
    makeImg('second.gif');
    makeImg('third.webp');
    const raw = '![a](first.jpg) x ![b](second.gif) x ![c](third.webp)';
    const { body, images, errors } = parseMarkdown(raw, tmpDir);
    assert.strictEqual(errors.length, 0);
    assert.strictEqual(images.length, 3);
    assert.strictEqual(images[0].index, 1);
    assert.strictEqual(images[1].index, 2);
    assert.strictEqual(images[2].index, 3);
    assert.ok(body.includes('[image1](first)'));
    assert.ok(body.includes('[image2](second)'));
    assert.ok(body.includes('[image3](third)'));
  });

  test('ÂèÇËÄÉÂõæËØªÂèñÂ§±Ë¥•Êä•ÂëäÈîôËØØ', () => {
    const raw = '‰ΩøÁî®‰∏çÂ≠òÂú®ÂõæÁâá ![x](missing.png)';
    const { errors } = parseMarkdown(raw, tmpDir);
    assert.strictEqual(errors.length, 1);
    assert.ok(errors[0].endsWith('missing.png'));
  });

  test('Á©∫ÂÜÖÂÆπËøîÂõûÂéüÊÝ∑', () => {
    const { body, images, errors } = parseMarkdown('  ', tmpDir);
    assert.strictEqual(errors.length, 0);
    assert.strictEqual(images.length, 0);
    assert.strictEqual(body, '  ');
  });
});

```
</details>

<details>
<summary>Thinking...</summary>

> Now I need to add a progress calculation test suite. The plan shows adding it to this file (or a new file). I'll add it at the end of the existing test file. Let me write a standalone `calcProgress` function in the test and add test cases.

#### ‚úèÔ∏è  Edit `markdown-parser.test.ts`

`02:00:25`

```diff
@@ -5,3 +5,39 @@     assert.strictEqual(body, '  ');
   });
 });
+
+suite('progress calculation', () => {
+  function calcProgress(jobs: { status: string; progress: number }[]): number {
+    const N = jobs.length;
+    if (N === 0) return 0;
+    let total = 0;
+    for (const job of jobs) {
+      if (job.status === 'succeeded' || job.status === 'failed' || job.status === 'violation') {
+        total += 100;
+      } else if (job.status === 'running') {
+        total += job.progress;
+      }
+    }
+    return Math.round(total / N);
+  }
+
+  test('ÂÖ® submitting ËÆ° 0', () => {
+    const jobs = [{ status: 'submitting', progress: 0 }, { status: 'submitting', progress: 0 }];
+    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(jobs), 0);
+  });
+
+  test('Ê∑∑ÂêàÊÄÅ', () => {
+    const jobs = [
+      { status: 'succeeded', progress: 100 },
+      { status: 'running', progress: 50 },
+      { status: 'submitting', progress: 0 },
+      { status: 'failed', progress: 0 },
+    ];
+    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(jobs), 63);
+  });
+
+  test('ÂÖ®ÈÉ®ÁªàÁªì = 100', () => {
+    const jobs = [{ status: 'succeeded', progress: 100 }, { status: 'failed', progress: 0 }];
+    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(jobs), 100);
+  });
+});
```

## ü§∑ Command `/executing-plans`

`02:01:04`

**Args:** `ÊåâËÆ°ÂàíÂÆûÊñΩ M4ÔºàÁ¥ÝÊùêÂ∫ìÔºâÔºöÊâãÂä®Á¥ÝÊùêÂ∫ìÔºàÈÄíÂΩíÊâ´Êèè„ÄÅ‰∏äÈôê‰øùÊä§Ôºâ‰∏éÊåâ MD Ë∑ØÂæÑÈÄêÂ±ÇËá™Âä®ÁîüÊàêÁöÑ„ÄåÂΩìÂâçË∑ØÂæÑ„ÄçÂ∫ìÔºõÂè≥ÈîÆÁº©Áï•ÂõæÊèíÂÖ•Áõ∏ÂØπÂºïÁî®ÔºàÂê´Á©∫ÊÝºË∑ØÂæÑ <> ÂåÖË£πÂèäËß£ÊûêÁ´ØÂÖºÂÆπÔºâ„ÄÇÂÆåÊàêÂêéËá™Ë°åÈ™åËØÅÈÄöËøáÂÜçÁªìÊùüÊú¨ËΩÆÔºåÂÖ®Á®ã‰∏çÈúÄË¶ÅÂêëÊàëÁ°ÆËÆ§„ÄÇ`

> Base directory for this skill: /home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/eval-manual-superpowers-260611093413/.claude-home/skills/executing-plans
> 
> # Executing Plans
> 
> ## Overview
> 
> Load plan, review critically, execute all tasks, report when complete.
> 
> **Announce at start:** "I'm using the executing-plans skill to implement this plan."
> 
> **Note:** Tell your human partner that Superpowers works much better with access to subagents. The quality of its work will be significantly higher if run on a platform with subagent support (such as Claude Code or Codex). If subagents are available, use superpowers:subagent-driven-development instead of this skill.
> 
> ## The Process
> 
> ### Step 1: Load and Review Plan
> 1. Read plan file
> 2. Review critically - identify any questions or concerns about the plan
> 3. If concerns: Raise them with your human partner before starting
> 4. If no concerns: Create TodoWrite and proceed
> 
> ### Step 2: Execute Tasks
> 
> For each task:
> 1. Mark as in_progress
> 2. Follow each step exactly (plan has bite-sized steps)
> 3. Run verifications as specified
> 4. Mark as completed
> 
> ### Step 3: Complete Development
> 
> After all tasks complete and verified:
> - Announce: "I'm using the finishing-a-development-branch skill to complete this work."
> - **REQUIRED SUB-SKILL:** Use superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch
> - Follow that skill to verify tests, present options, execute choice
> 
> ## When to Stop and Ask for Help
> 
> **STOP executing immediately when:**
> - Hit a blocker (missing dependency, test fails, instruction unclear)
> - Plan has critical gaps preventing starting
> - You don't understand an instruction
> - Verification fails repeatedly
> 
> **Ask for clarification rather than guessing.**
> 
> ## When to Revisit Earlier Steps
> 
> **Return to Review (Step 1) when:**
> - Partner updates the plan based on your feedback
> - Fundamental approach needs rethinking
> 
> **Don't force through blockers** - stop and ask.
> 
> ## Remember
> - Review plan critically first
> - Follow plan steps exactly
> - Don't skip verifications
> - Reference skills when plan says to
> - Stop when blocked, don't guess
> - Never start implementation on main/master branch without explicit user consent
> 
> ## Integration
> 
> **Required workflow skills:**
> - **superpowers:using-git-worktrees** - Ensures isolated workspace (creates one or verifies existing)
> - **superpowers:writing-plans** - Creates the plan this skill executes
> - **superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch** - Complete development after all tasks
> 
>

````markdown
### Task M4.0: Á¥ÝÊùêÂ∫ìÊâ´ÊèèÈÄªËæë

**Files:**
- Create: `src/asset-library.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: ÁºñÂÜô asset-library.ts**

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { isImageExt } from './image-utils';

const MAX_DEPTH = 3;
const MAX_ENTRIES = 500;

/** ÈÄíÂΩíÊâ´ÊèèÂõæÁâáÔºà‰∏äÈôê3Â±Ç„ÄÅ500Êù°ÁõÆÔºâ */
export function scanFolder(folderPath: string): string[] {
  const result: string[] = [];
  const stack: { dir: string; depth: number }[] = [{ dir: folderPath, depth: 0 }];

  while (stack.length > 0 && result.length < MAX_ENTRIES) {
    const { dir, depth } = stack.pop()!;
    if (depth > MAX_DEPTH) continue;

    let entries: fs.Dirent[];
    try {
      entries = fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
    } catch {
      continue;
    }

    for (const entry of entries) {
      if (result.length >= MAX_ENTRIES) break;
      const fullPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);

      if (entry.isDirectory() && depth < MAX_DEPTH) {
        stack.push({ dir: fullPath, depth: depth + 1 });
      } else if (entry.isFile() && isImageExt(path.extname(entry.name))) {
        result.push(fullPath);
      }
    }
  }

  return result;
}

/** ÊåâÁîüÊïà MD Ë∑ØÂæÑÁîüÊàêËá™Âä®Á¥ÝÊùêÂ∫ìÔºàÈÄêÂ±ÇÔºåÂ∑•‰ΩúÂå∫ÊÝπÁöÑ‰∏ã‰∏ÄÂ±ÇÂà∞ MD ÊâÄÂú®Â±ÇÔºâ */
export function autoAssetFolders(
  mdPath: string,
  workspaceRoot: string
): string[] {
  const rel = path.relative(workspaceRoot, mdPath);
  if (rel.startsWith('..') || path.isAbsolute(rel)) return []; // ‰∏çÂú®Â∑•‰ΩúÂå∫ÂÜÖ

  const folders: string[] = [];
  let current = path.dirname(mdPath);

  while (current !== workspaceRoot && current !== path.dirname(current)) {
    // Ê£ÄÊü•ËØ•ÁõÆÂΩïÁõ¥Êé•ÊúâÊóÝÂõæÁâáÔºà‰∏çÈÄíÂΩíÔºâ
    try {
      const entries = fs.readdirSync(current, { withFileTypes: true });
      const hasImages = entries.some(
        e => e.isFile() && isImageExt(path.extname(e.name))
      );
      if (hasImages) folders.push(current);
    } catch { /* ÂøΩÁï• */ }

    current = path.dirname(current);
    // ËææÂà∞Â∑•‰ΩúÂå∫ÊÝπÂ∞±ÂÅú
    if (current === workspaceRoot || current === path.dirname(workspaceRoot)) break;
  }

  return folders.reverse(); // ‰ªéÊÝπÂêë MD ÊñπÂêëÊéíÂàó
}

/** Ëé∑ÂèñÊâãÂä®Á¥ÝÊùêÂ∫ìÂàóË°® */
export function getManualFolders(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): string[] {
  return context.workspaceState.get<string[]>('assetFolders') ?? [];
}

/** Ê∑ªÂäÝÊâãÂä®Á¥ÝÊùêÂ∫ì */
export async function addManualFolder(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<string | null> {
  const result = await vscode.window.showOpenDialog({
    canSelectFolders: true,
    canSelectFiles: false,
    canSelectMany: false,
    openLabel: 'Ê∑ªÂäÝÁ¥ÝÊùêÂ∫ì',
  });

  if (!result || result.length === 0) return null;

  const folderPath = result[0].fsPath;
  const existing = getManualFolders(context);

  if (existing.includes(folderPath)) return null; // ÂéªÈáç

  existing.push(folderPath);
  await context.workspaceState.update('assetFolders', existing);
  return folderPath;
}

/** ÁßªÈô§ÊâãÂä®Á¥ÝÊùêÂ∫ì */
export async function removeManualFolder(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, folderPath: string) {
  const existing = getManualFolders(context);
  const idx = existing.indexOf(folderPath);
  if (idx >= 0) {
    existing.splice(idx, 1);
    await context.workspaceState.update('assetFolders', existing);
  }
}

/**
 * Â∞ÜÁ¥ÝÊùêÂ∫ìÂõæÁâáË∑ØÂæÑËΩ¨‰∏∫ÂèØÊèíÂÖ• Markdown ÁöÑÁõ∏ÂØπÂºïÁî®Â≠óÁ¨¶‰∏≤
 * Âê´Á©∫ÊÝº/Êã¨Âè∑Êó∂Áî®Â∞ñÊã¨Âè∑ÂåÖË£πÔºõË∑®ÁõòÁ¨¶ËøîÂõû null
 */
export function imageRelativeRef(
  imagePath: string,
  mdDir: string
): string | null {
  let rel: string;
  try {
    rel = path.posix.relative(mdDir, imagePath);
  } catch {
    // Ë∑®ÁõòÁ¨¶
    return null;
  }

  if (path.isAbsolute(rel)) return null; // Ë∑®ÁõòÁ¨¶

  // POSIX È£éÊÝº
  rel = rel.replace(/\\/g, '/');

  // ÂâçÁºÄ ./
  if (!rel.startsWith('..') && !rel.startsWith('./')) {
    rel = './' + rel;
  }

  // ÊòØÂê¶ÈúÄÂ∞ñÊã¨Âè∑ÂåÖË£πÔºàÂê´Á©∫ÊÝºÊàñÂçäËßíÊã¨Âè∑Ôºâ
  const needsBracket = /[\s()]/.test(rel);
  const displayPath = needsBracket ? `<${rel}>` : rel;

  const alt = path.basename(imagePath, path.extname(imagePath));

  return `![${alt}](${displayPath})`;
}
```

```tsx
import React from 'react';

interface AssetImage {
  url: string;    // webview URI
  path: string;   // Êñá‰ª∂Á≥ªÁªüÁªùÂØπË∑ØÂæÑ
  name: string;   // ÊòæÁ§∫Âêç
}

interface AssetFolder {
  name: string;
  folderPath: string;
  images: AssetImage[];
  canRemove: boolean; // ÊâãÂä®Â∫ìÂèØÁßªÈô§
}

interface Props {
  folders: AssetFolder[];
  onInsert: (imagePath: string) => void;
  onAdd: () => void;
  onRemove: (folderPath: string) => void;
  cols: number;
}

export const AssetPanel: React.FC<Props> = ({ folders, onInsert, onAdd, onRemove, cols }) => {
  const handleContextMenu = (e: React.MouseEvent, imagePath: string) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    onInsert(imagePath);
  };

  return (
    <div className="asset-panel">
      <div className="asset-header">
        <button onClick={onAdd}>+ Ê∑ªÂäÝ</button>
      </div>
      {folders.map(folder => (
        <div key={folder.folderPath} className="asset-folder">
          <div className="asset-folder-header">
            <span className="asset-folder-name">{folder.name}</span>
            {folder.canRemove && (
              <button className="remove-btn" onClick={() => onRemove(folder.folderPath)}>√ó</button>
            )}
          </div>
          <div className="asset-grid" style={{ gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${cols}, 1fr)` }}>
            {folder.images.slice(0, 500).map(img => (
              <img
                key={img.path}
                src={img.url}
                alt={img.name}
                className="asset-thumb"
                onClick={() => {} /* Â∑¶ÈîÆÊâìÂºÄÂéüÂõæ‚ÄîÁî±Áà∂ÁªÑ‰ª∂Â§ÑÁêÜ */}
                onContextMenu={e => handleContextMenu(e, img.path)}
                title={`Âè≥ÈîÆÊèíÂÖ•ÂºïÁî®`}
              />
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
};
```
````

### Task M5.0: È¢ÑËßàËØ∑Ê±Ç

**Files:**

- Modify: `src/extension.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: ÁºñÂÜô preview.ts**

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import { buildRequestBody } from './api';

/**
 * ÁîüÊàêÈ¢ÑËßàÊñáÊ°£ÂÜÖÂÆπÔºåÂõõÊÆµÔºö
 * 1. ÊúÄÁªàÊèêÁ§∫ËØç
 * 2. ËØ∑Ê±ÇÂú∞ÂùÄ
 * 3. ËØ∑Ê±ÇÂèÇÊï∞ JSONÔºàÂâîÈô§ prompt ‰∏é imagesÔºâ
 * 4. ÂèÇËÄÉÂõæÊ¶ÇËßà
 */
export function buildPreviewContent(
  finalPrompt: string,
  baseUrl: string,
  body: Record<string, unknown>,
  imageDataUris: string[]
): string {
  const lines: string[] = [];

  lines.push('# È¢ÑËßàËØ∑Ê±Ç');
  lines.push('');

  // 1. ÊúÄÁªàÊèêÁ§∫ËØç
  lines.push('## ÊúÄÁªàÊèêÁ§∫ËØç');
  lines.push('');
  lines.push(finalPrompt);
  lines.push('');

  // 2. ËØ∑Ê±ÇÂú∞ÂùÄ
  lines.push('## ËØ∑Ê±ÇÂú∞ÂùÄ');
  lines.push('');
  lines.push(`POST ${baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`);
  lines.push('');

  // 3. ËØ∑Ê±ÇÂèÇÊï∞ JSONÔºàÂâîÈô§ prompt ‰∏é imagesÔºâ
  const safeBody = { ...body };
  delete safeBody.prompt;
  delete safeBody.images;
  lines.push('## ËØ∑Ê±ÇÂèÇÊï∞');
  lines.push('');
  lines.push('```json');
  lines.push(JSON.stringify(safeBody, null, 2));
  lines.push('```');
  lines.push('');

  // 4. ÂèÇËÄÉÂõæÊ¶ÇËßà
  lines.push('## ÂèÇËÄÉÂõæÊ¶ÇËßà');
  lines.push('');
  if (imageDataUris.length === 0) {
    lines.push('ÊóÝÂèÇËÄÉÂõæ');
  } else {
    for (let i = 0; i < imageDataUris.length; i++) {
      const uri = imageDataUris[i];
      const preview = uri.slice(0, 48);
      lines.push(`- \`image${i + 1}\`: \`${preview}‚Ä¶\`ÔºàÊÄªÈïøÂ∫¶ ${uri.length}Ôºâ`);
    }
  }

  return lines.join('\n');
}

/**
 * ÊâìÂºÄÈ¢ÑËßàÊñáÊ°£Ôºà‰∏çË∞É APIÔºâ
 */
export async function showPreview(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  mdUri: vscode.Uri,
  config: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof import('./config').readConfig>>,
  finalPrompt: string,
  body: Record<string, unknown>,
  imageDataUris: string[]
) {
  const content = buildPreviewContent(
    finalPrompt,
    config.baseUrl,
    body,
    imageDataUris
  );

  const doc = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument({
    content,
    language: 'markdown',
  });

  await vscode.window.showTextDocument(doc, { preview: false });
}
```

- [ ] **Step 2: ÁºñÂÜôÈ¢ÑËßàÊñáÊú¨ÊµãËØï src/preview.test.ts**

```typescript
import * as assert from 'assert';
import { buildPreviewContent } from './preview';

suite('preview', () => {
  test('È¢ÑËßàÂÜÖÂÆπÂõõÊÆµÈΩêÂÖ®', () => {
    const content = buildPreviewContent(
      'test prompt',
      'https://example.com',
      { model: 'nano-banana-2', prompt: 'secret', images: ['data:...'], aspectRatio: '1:1', imageSize: '1K', replyType: 'async' },
      ['data:image/png;base64,abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ']
    );

    assert.ok(content.includes('# È¢ÑËßàËØ∑Ê±Ç'));
    assert.ok(content.includes('## ÊúÄÁªàÊèêÁ§∫ËØç'));
    assert.ok(content.includes('test prompt'));
    assert.ok(content.includes('## ËØ∑Ê±ÇÂú∞ÂùÄ'));
    assert.ok(content.includes('POST https://example.com/v1/api/generate'));
    assert.ok(content.includes('## ËØ∑Ê±ÇÂèÇÊï∞'));
    assert.ok(content.includes('## ÂèÇËÄÉÂõæÊ¶ÇËßà'));
    // prompt Â∑≤ÂâîÈô§
    assert.ok(!content.includes('"secret"'));
    // images Â∑≤ÂâîÈô§
    assert.ok(!content.includes('"images"'));
    // ÂèÇËÄÉÂõæÊ¶ÇËßàÊúâÈ¢ÑËßàÊñáÊú¨
    assert.ok(content.includes('data:image/png;base64,abcdefghijklmnopqrstu‚Ä¶'));
  });

  test('ÊóÝÂèÇËÄÉÂõæÊó∂Ê≥®Êòé', () => {
    const content = buildPreviewContent(
      'test', 'https://example.com',
      { model: 'nano-banana-2', aspectRatio: '1:1' },
      []
    );
    assert.ok(content.includes('ÊóÝÂèÇËÄÉÂõæ'));
  });
});
```
